title: Syracuse men’s lacrosse shakes off pesky Colgate to close out JMA Dome slate undefeated (Axe’s quick takes)
summary: Syracuse University men's lacrosse team defeated Colgate 14-7 on Senior Day at the JMA Dome, finishing their non-conference home schedule undefeated. This article covers a university athletic event with no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations or Chief Innovation Officer priorities.
